sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33384" key="e)laioxu/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιο-χύτησις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n33384.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">anointing with oil</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.61</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
